channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: DOGE isn’t Silicon Valley innovation—it’s just a sloppy rebrand of free-market dogma
item.description: At a press conference in the Oval Office earlier this month, Elon Musk—a billionaire who is not, at least formally, the President of the United States—was asked how the Department of Government Efficiency manages potential conflicts of interest to ensure “accountability and transparency.
item.dc:creator: Jay Willis, Fast Company

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011 and which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Google’s AlloyDB is looking more and more like PostgreSQL
item.description: Google is adding new features to its fully managed database-as-a-service (DBaaS) AlloyDB in order to provide enterprises with an alternative to PostgreSQL, which has become the most popular choice when transitioning from legacy database management systems.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple unveils 'age assurance' technology amid child safety push
item.description: Apple will introduce "age assurance" technology to boost children's privacy and safety on the company's devices, the company announced Thursday as part of its broader push to protect kids online.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Monster Hunter Wilds best controller settings
item.description: Here's the best Monster Hunter Wilds controller settings, including ways to improve Focus Mode, and the handling of your Seikret.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is an AI server? Why artificial intelligence needs specialized systems
item.description: AI servers are advanced computing systems designed to handle complex, resource-intensive AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Not even Google is safe from job cuts - cloud, HR roles set to go
item.description: Google’s People Operations workers are at risk as the company looks to shed some of its more expensive employees.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Meta says it has fired several employees for leaking internal data
item.description: Meta has faced a recent surge in leaks, with the company announcing it has fired "roughly 20" employees.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: The rising threat of shadow AI
item.description: Employees in a large financial organization began developing AI tools to automate time-consuming tasks such as weekly report generation. They didn’t think about what could go wrong. Within a few months, unauthorized applications skyrocketed from just a couple to 65.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: MasOrange acelera su transformación digital avivada por la IA mediante una alianza con Google Cloud
item.description: A las puertas de la celebración de una nueva edición del Mobile World Congress (MWC), MasOrange anuncia una nueva alianza estratégica.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 7 ways to fight back against spam phone calls
item.description: Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it’s a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it’s enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: What is retrieval-augmented generation? More accurate and reliable LLMs
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a technique used to “ground” large language models (LLMs) with specific data sources, often sources that weren’t included in the models’ original training.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China cyber espionage up by 150 percent in 2024: Report
item.description: China's cyber espionage operations continue to become more aggressive amid the increasing use of emerging technologies like artificial intelligence (AI) to help carry out attacks, according to a report published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft calls on Trump to loosen AI chip export restrictions
item.description: Microsoft is calling on the Trump administration to loosen Biden-era restrictions on artificial intelligence (AI) chip exports that it argues could undermine U.S. leadership on the technology.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Overcoming data compliance and security challenges in the age of AI
item.description: We are in the era of artificial intelligence (AI), and businesses are unlocking unprecedented opportunities for growth and efficiency.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Evolving Application and Load Balancing Software for Secure Multicloud Workloads
item.description: F5 is evolving its core application and load balancing software to help customers secure and manage AI-powered and multicloud workloads
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Vietnam plans energy shift toward building more solar, less reliance on gas and coal
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam is revising its energy plans to focus more on large solar farms and less on reliance on coal and natural gas. The fast-growing economy now aims to get 16% of its energy from the sun — more than triple its earlier target of just 5%.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft’s .NET 10 arrives in first preview
item.description: Microsoft has rolled out the first preview of .NET 10, a major new version of the company’s flagship software development platform. Likely to arrive as a production release in November, .NET 10 introduces C# 14 and adds major enhancements to the .NET runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Future of Compute: Auction-Based Exchange Brings Efficiency and Transparency
item.description: Compute Exchange offers an auction-based exchange for AI compute resources, providing transparency, efficiency, and neutrality to the computing markets.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cot framework aims to ease Rust web development
item.description: Web developers looking for an easier time with the Rust language may want to check out Cot, an emerging web framework pitched as being for “lazy developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes fails to overturn her Theranos fraud conviction
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Elizabeth Holmes, the disgraced founder of Theranos, will remain in prison after losing a bid Monday to overturn her fraud conviction, with a federal appeals court saying she hadn’t proved there were legal missteps during her trial for defrauding investors with false claims of w
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: This is what no one planned could happen after taking a DNA test
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says DNA tests pose privacy risks like shared genetic information, inaccuracies and hard data deletion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Crazy futuristic city being populated by people willing to leave the real world behind
item.description: Woven City is Toyota's experimental city that is a fully functional environment for people to live, work and play while doing research.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to set your preferred web browser on your desktop and mobile devices
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy takes you through the steps to easily set your preferred web browser whether you're using a Mac, Windows PC, iPhone or Android.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
